title: EntityGraphView
description: Response of GET /api/entities/:id — one entity's node in the knowledge graph: its labels, its incoming/outgoing typed entity<->entity relations, and its direct dataset count.

out.description: Edges where this entity is the subject (e.g. municipality --part_of--> oblast).

in.description: Edges where this entity is the object (e.g. an oblast's child municipalities).

datasetCount.description: Number of datasets linked directly to this entity (from dataset_entities).

kind.description: Entity kind, e.g. geographic_unit; 'unknown' for an unresolvable far endpoint.

labelBg.description: Authoritative Bulgarian label (verbatim); equals the id for an unresolved placeholder.

labelEn.description: Derived English label; null if unknown.

predicate.description: Relation type from the closed vocabulary.
